text: Science has a clearer story about monsoons than social media does. Monsoons occur when land heats up faster than oceans. This creates pressure differences. As warm air rises, it pulls in moisture-laden winds, leading to heavy rains. These rains are crucial for agriculture in many regions, but they can also cause devastating floods. So, next time you hear about monsoons, remember, there’s science behind the storms. Curious about more weather wonders? Hit like and follow for more!
